name: Chili#2
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Ground beef, chicken, or Turkey
4 cups Cooked kidney beans or Pinto beans
1 1/2 cups Grated natural sharp cheese -- or mild cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a frying pan, sauté meat until lightly browned.
2. Pour off drippings.
3. Add water, chili powder, and curry powder; simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Add diced tomatoes and beans; heat through.
5. Stir in chopped onions.
6. Ladle into serving bowls and sprinkle with cheese.
